title: ABCClinicalDemandForecast JSON Schema
description: Schema defining the structure of ABCClinicalDemandForecast used for clinical trial demand forecasting in ABC-Plan.

planNotes.title: Plan Notes
planNotes.description: Optional notes about the clinical demand forecast plan.

analytics.$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for analytics configuration. Used by scripts/assemble-schemas.js to replace __ABC_JSON_SCHEMA_PLACEHOLDER_ANALYTICS__ in each template. DO NOT reference this file directly — it is inlined into parent schemas at build time.

items.title: Analytics Item
items.description: An analytics item that can be either a time series or an analytics note

excludeMonthsFromBeginning.description: Number of months to exclude from the beginning of the time series. Positive values trim, negative values add months before the plan start date.

excludeMonthsFromEnd.description: Number of months to exclude from the end of the time series. Positive values trim, negative values add months after the plan end date.

timeAggregateType.title: Time Aggregate Type
timeAggregateType.description: The aggregation level for time series data display

showDataPointValues.description: Display data point values directly on the chart
Display data point values directly on the chart
Display data point values directly on the chart

showQuantitiesAs.title: Show Quantities As
showQuantitiesAs.description: How to display the quantities for this metric

comparisonPlanID.title: Comparison Plan ID
comparisonPlanID.description: The ID of the comparison plan to use for this metric or null if no comparison plan is used

regionID.title: Region ID
regionID.description: Optional region filter for Clinical Demand Forecast metrics

armID.title: Arm ID
armID.description: Optional treatment arm filter for Clinical Demand Forecast metrics

kitID.title: Kit ID
kitID.description: Optional kit filter for Clinical Demand Forecast metrics

itemID.title: Item ID
itemID.description: Optional item filter for Clinical Demand Forecast metrics

tabID.description: ID of the tab this layout item belongs to

isDraggable.description: Whether the item can be dragged

isResizable.description: Whether the item can be resized

clinicalDemandForecastConfiguration.title: Clinical Demand Forecast Configuration
clinicalDemandForecastConfiguration.description: All algorithm inputs that affect forecast calculation. Any change to this object invalidates clinicalDemandCalculatedForecast.

clinicalDemandCalculatedForecast.title: Clinical Demand Calculated Forecast
clinicalDemandCalculatedForecast.description: Calculated demand forecast with atomic monthly data per-region, per-arm.

$comment: AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/assemble-schemas.js — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND

ClinicalDemandForecastConfiguration.title: Clinical Demand Forecast Configuration
ClinicalDemandForecastConfiguration.description: All algorithm inputs that affect forecast calculation. Any change to this object should invalidate the calculated forecast.

studyOverview.title: Study Overview
studyOverview.description: Basic information about the clinical trial study.

kitConfiguration.title: Kit Configuration
kitConfiguration.description: Configuration of kits with containers and items, keyed by kit ID.

dosingRegimens.title: Dosing Regimens
dosingRegimens.description: Available dosing regimens for the study, keyed by ID.

treatmentArms.title: Treatment Arms
treatmentArms.description: Treatment arms in the clinical trial, keyed by ID.

actuals.title: Clinical Demand Actuals
actuals.description: Actual enrollment data entered by users to reconcile with forecast.

trialDesign.title: Trial Design
trialDesign.description: Trial design type: parallel (single regimen per arm) or crossOver (sequence of treatments with washout periods).

StudyOverview.title: Study Overview
StudyOverview.description: Basic study information from wizard step 1.

studyName.title: Study Name
studyName.description: Name of the clinical trial study.

protocolSummary.title: Protocol Summary
protocolSummary.description: Summary of the trial protocol. Optional field with recommended default: empty string.

therapeuticArea.title: Therapeutic Area
therapeuticArea.description: Disease category being treated (e.g., Oncology, CNS, Rare Disease). Will be normalized by LLM for benchmarking. Required field with recommended default: empty string.

targetCompleted.title: Target Completed
targetCompleted.description: Target number of subjects to complete the trial.

screenFailureRate.title: Screen Failure Rate
screenFailureRate.description: Percentage of subjects who fail screening (0-100).

attritionRate.title: Attrition Rate
attritionRate.description: Percentage of enrolled subjects who drop out of the study entirely and stop receiving all doses (0-100). NOTE: This is different from adverse events in dose escalation regimens. Attrition causes subjects to exit the study early, while adverse events only prevent dose escalation but subjects continue receiving doses at their maximum tolerated level.

Kit.title: Kit
Kit.description: A kit containing items and containers. The kit ID is the key in the kitConfiguration map.

items.title: Items
items.description: Items and containers within this kit, keyed by node ID.

KitContainer.title: Kit Container
KitContainer.description: A structural container (bottle, blister pack) that holds other nodes. The container ID is the key in the parent items/children map.

nodeType.title: Node Type
nodeType.description: Discriminator identifying this as a container node.

children.title: Children
children.description: Items contained within this container, keyed by node ID.

ordering.title: Ordering
ordering.description: Display order of this node within its parent. Lower numbers appear first.

KitItem.title: Kit Item
KitItem.description: An actual pharmaceutical item (tablet, capsule, vial) with dosage. The item ID is the key in the parent items/children map.

nodeType.title: Node Type
nodeType.description: Discriminator identifying this as an item node.

quantity.title: Quantity
quantity.description: Number of units contained in this item within one kit. For example, if this is a bottle containing tablets, quantity=10 means the bottle contains 10 tablets. This is NOT the same as dosingRegimen.kitItemQuantities, which specifies consumption per dose. This quantity field defines the container/packaging size.

ordering.title: Ordering
ordering.description: Display order of this node within its parent. Lower numbers appear first.

DosingRegimen.title: Dosing Regimen
DosingRegimen.description: Dosing regimen configuration with nested dosingRegimenDefinition discriminated union.

dosingRegimenDefinition.title: Dosing Regimen Definition
dosingRegimenDefinition.description: Discriminated union: either an active regimen definition (isPlacebo: false) or a placebo definition (isPlacebo: true).

ActiveRegimenDefinition.title: Active Regimen Definition
ActiveRegimenDefinition.description: Definition for an active (non-placebo) dosing regimen.

treatmentDuration.title: Treatment Duration
treatmentDuration.description: Total duration of treatment for all subjects.

fixedConfig.title: Fixed Dose Configuration
fixedConfig.description: Configuration for fixed dose regimens. Null if using another regimen type.

doseEscalationConfig.title: Dose Escalation Configuration
doseEscalationConfig.description: Configuration for dose escalation regimens. Null if using another regimen type.

weightBasedConfig.title: Weight-Based Configuration
weightBasedConfig.description: Configuration for weight-based dosing regimens. Null if using another regimen type.

ageBasedConfig.title: Age-Based Configuration
ageBasedConfig.description: Configuration for age-based dosing regimens. Null if using another regimen type.

PlaceboRegimenDefinition.title: Placebo Regimen Definition
PlaceboRegimenDefinition.description: Definition for a placebo regimen that references an active regimen.

placeboOf.title: Placebo Of
placeboOf.description: ID of the active dosing regimen this placebo references. Placebo inherits all dosing configuration from the active regimen.

kitItemQuantities.title: Kit Item Quantities
kitItemQuantities.description: Mapping of kit item IDs to quantities consumed per dose.

levels.title: Escalation Levels
levels.description: Map of level IDs to dose escalation levels. Use ordering property to maintain display order.

DoseEscalationLevel.title: Dose Escalation Level
DoseEscalationLevel.description: Individual dose escalation level configuration. This is a discriminated union with three variants: First level (isFirstLevel=true), Intermediate level (isFinalLevel=false, has adverseEventRate), and Final level (isFinalLevel=true, no duration).

DoseEscalationLevelBase.$comment: additionalProperties is true because this object acts as a base schema and is composed with variant-specific definitions via allOf.
DoseEscalationLevelBase.title: Dose Escalation Level Base
DoseEscalationLevelBase.description: Base properties shared by all dose escalation level variants.

kitItemQuantities.title: Kit Item Quantities
kitItemQuantities.description: Mapping of kit item IDs to quantities consumed per dose at this escalation level.

ordering.title: Ordering
ordering.description: Display order of this level within the escalation sequence. Lower numbers appear first.

DoseEscalationLevelFirst.title: First Dose Escalation Level
DoseEscalationLevelFirst.description: First escalation level. Has isFirstLevel=true, isFinalLevel=false, duration and durationUnit. Does NOT have adverseEventRate because adverse events occur when trialing a level, and there is no previous level to trial from.

isFirstLevel.title: Is First Level
isFirstLevel.description: Must be true for first level.

isFinalLevel.title: Is Final Level
isFinalLevel.description: Must be false for first level (first level cannot also be final).

durationUnit.title: Duration Unit
durationUnit.description: Unit of duration for this level.

DoseEscalationLevelIntermediate.title: Intermediate Dose Escalation Level
DoseEscalationLevelIntermediate.description: Intermediate escalation level (not first, not final). Has isFinalLevel=false, duration, durationUnit, and adverseEventRate. Does NOT have isFirstLevel property.

isFinalLevel.title: Is Final Level
isFinalLevel.description: Must be false for intermediate level.

durationUnit.title: Duration Unit
durationUnit.description: Unit of duration for this level.

adverseEventRate.title: Adverse Event Rate
adverseEventRate.description: Percentage of subjects who experience adverse events when TRIALING THIS level from the previous level.

DoseEscalationLevelFinal.title: Final Dose Escalation Level
DoseEscalationLevelFinal.description: Final escalation level. Has isFinalLevel=true and adverseEventRate. Does NOT have duration or durationUnit (subjects continue at final level until treatment ends).

isFinalLevel.title: Is Final Level
isFinalLevel.description: Must be true for final level.

adverseEventRate.title: Adverse Event Rate
adverseEventRate.description: Percentage of subjects who experience adverse events when TRIALING THIS level from the previous level.

ranges.title: Weight Ranges
ranges.description: Map of range IDs to weight ranges for kit assignment. Use ordering property to maintain display order.

kitItemQuantities.title: Kit Item Quantities
kitItemQuantities.description: Mapping of kit item IDs to quantities consumed per dose for subjects in THIS weight range. Each value represents the number of units (e.g., tablets) of that item required for a single dose. Different weight ranges can specify different quantities for the same item.

fromWeight.title: From Weight
fromWeight.description: Minimum weight for this range (null for no lower bound).

toWeight.title: To Weight
toWeight.description: Maximum weight for this range (null for no upper bound).

expectedPercentage.title: Expected Percentage
expectedPercentage.description: Expected percentage of subjects in this weight range.

ordering.title: Ordering
ordering.description: Display order of this range. Lower numbers appear first.

ranges.title: Age Ranges
ranges.description: Map of range IDs to age ranges for kit assignment. Use ordering property to maintain display order.

kitItemQuantities.title: Kit Item Quantities
kitItemQuantities.description: Mapping of kit item IDs to quantities consumed per dose for subjects in THIS age range. Each value represents the number of units (e.g., tablets) of that item required for a single dose. Different age ranges can specify different quantities for the same item.

fromAge.title: From Age
fromAge.description: Minimum age for this range (null for no lower bound).

toAge.title: To Age
toAge.description: Maximum age for this range (null for no upper bound).

expectedPercentage.title: Expected Percentage
expectedPercentage.description: Expected percentage of subjects in this age range.

ordering.title: Ordering
ordering.description: Display order of this range. Lower numbers appear first.

TreatmentPeriod.title: Treatment Period
TreatmentPeriod.description: Treatment period in a dosing regimen sequence.

periodType.title: Period Type
periodType.description: Discriminator identifying this as a treatment period.

dosingRegimenId.title: Dosing Regimen ID
dosingRegimenId.description: ID of the dosing regimen used during this treatment period.

ordering.title: Ordering
ordering.description: Order position of this period in the sequence.

WashoutPeriod.title: Washout Period
WashoutPeriod.description: Washout period (no dosing) in a dosing regimen sequence.

periodType.title: Period Type
periodType.description: Discriminator identifying this as a washout period.

ordering.title: Ordering
ordering.description: Order position of this period in the sequence.

SequencePeriodMap.title: Sequence Periods
SequencePeriodMap.description: Ordered sequence of treatment and washout periods, keyed by unique period ID.

TreatmentArm.title: Treatment Arm
TreatmentArm.description: Treatment arm configuration from wizard step 5.

allocationPercentage.title: Allocation Percentage
allocationPercentage.description: Percentage of subjects allocated to this arm.

dosingRegimenSequence.title: Dosing Regimen Sequence
dosingRegimenSequence.description: Sequence of treatment and washout periods for this treatment arm.

SubjectFlow.title: Subject Flow
SubjectFlow.description: Site supply and region configuration from wizard step 6.

regions.title: Countries
regions.description: Region-specific site configuration, keyed by ID.

RegionContainer.title: Region Container
RegionContainer.description: Container node for grouping regions. Has subregions but no sites.

nodeType.title: Node Type
nodeType.description: Discriminator identifying this as a container node.

activationStartDate.title: Activation Start Date
activationStartDate.description: Default activation start date for child regions. Null means no default.

screenRate.title: Screen Rate
screenRate.description: Default screen rate for child regions. Null means no default.

siteActivationRate.title: Site Activation Rate
siteActivationRate.description: Default site activation rate for child regions. Null means no default.

maxEnrollmentPerSite.title: Maximum Enrollment Per Site
maxEnrollmentPerSite.description: Default max enrollment per site for child regions. Null means no default.

siteSeeding.title: Site Seeding
siteSeeding.description: Default site seeding quantity per kit for child regions. Map of kitId to quantity, or null to inherit.

RegionLeaf.title: Region Leaf
RegionLeaf.description: Leaf node representing an operational region with sites.

nodeType.title: Node Type
nodeType.description: Discriminator identifying this as a leaf region node.

numberOfSites.title: Number of Sites
numberOfSites.description: Total number of sites in this region.

activationStartDate.title: Activation Start Date
activationStartDate.description: Date when site activation begins. Null inherits from parent container.

screenRate.title: Screen Rate
screenRate.description: Number of subjects screened per site per month. Null inherits from parent container.

siteActivationRate.title: Site Activation Rate
siteActivationRate.description: Number of sites activated per month. Null inherits from parent container.

maxEnrollmentPerSite.title: Maximum Enrollment Per Site
maxEnrollmentPerSite.description: Maximum number of patients that can be enrolled per site. Null for unlimited or inherited.

siteSeeding.title: Site Seeding
siteSeeding.description: Site seeding quantity per kit. Map of kitId to quantity, or null to inherit from parent.

RegionForecast.title: Region Forecast
RegionForecast.description: Atomic monthly forecast data for a single region. All values are monthly (not cumulative). UI computes cumulative views.

sites.title: Sites
sites.description: Monthly count of sites opened this month.

subjectsScreened.title: Subjects Screened
subjectsScreened.description: Monthly count of subjects screened this month.

subjectsScreenedOut.title: Subjects Screened Out
subjectsScreenedOut.description: Monthly count of subjects who failed screening this month.

subjectsEnrolled.title: Subjects Enrolled
subjectsEnrolled.description: Monthly subjects enrolled, broken down by treatment arm.

subjectsActive.title: Subjects Active
subjectsActive.description: Monthly change in active subjects (new active this month), broken down by treatment arm.

subjectsCompleted.title: Subjects Completed
subjectsCompleted.description: Monthly subjects who completed treatment, broken down by treatment arm.

subjectsDroppedOut.title: Subjects Dropped Out
subjectsDroppedOut.description: Monthly subjects who dropped out, broken down by treatment arm.

kitDemand.title: Kit Demand
kitDemand.description: Monthly kit demand (whole kits rounded up), broken down by treatment arm and kit ID. Use this for supply planning - it accounts for buffer/waste in partially-used bottles.

kitItemDemand.title: Kit Item Demand
kitItemDemand.description: Monthly kit item consumption (what patients actually receive), broken down by treatment arm and item ID. Displayed as 'Dosing' in the UI. Note: This is consumption, not supply demand - it does not include buffer/waste from partially-used bottles. For supply planning, use kitDemand.

siteSeedingKitDemand.title: Site Seeding Kit Demand
siteSeedingKitDemand.description: Site seeding kit demand - kits shipped when sites activate (not treatment-driven). Keyed by kit ID.

ClinicalDemandCalculatedForecast.title: Clinical Demand Calculated Forecast
ClinicalDemandCalculatedForecast.description: Atomic monthly forecast data. Contains per-region data only. UI computes global totals and cumulative views.

byRegion.title: By Region
byRegion.description: Region-specific forecast data keyed by region ID.

PositiveDateMap.title: Positive Date Map
PositiveDateMap.description: Mapping of dates to positive numerical values.

ByArmDateMap.title: By Arm Date Map
ByArmDateMap.description: Mapping of treatment arm IDs to date-value maps. Each arm ID maps to a PositiveDateMap.

KitDemandEntry.title: Kit Demand Entry
KitDemandEntry.description: Kit demand with placeboOf tagging for active/placebo separation.

demand.description: Monthly kit demand values keyed by YYYY-MM-DD date.

placeboOf.description: Regimen ID this is placebo of, or null if active.

KitItemDemandEntry.title: Kit Item Demand Entry
KitItemDemandEntry.description: Kit item consumption entry with placeboOf tagging for active/placebo separation. Represents what patients actually receive, not supply demand.

demand.description: Monthly kit item demand values keyed by YYYY-MM-DD date.

placeboOf.description: Regimen ID this is placebo of, or null if active.

ByArmSequenceKitDateMap.title: By Arm Sequence Kit Date Map
ByArmSequenceKitDateMap.description: Mapping of treatment arm IDs to sequence periods to kit demand. Structure: arm → sequenceId → kit → KitDemandEntry. The sequence ID matches keys in dosingRegimenSequence.

.*.description: Mapping of sequence period IDs to kit demand for this arm.
Mapping of kit IDs to KitDemandEntry for this sequence period.

ByArmSequenceKitItemDateMap.title: By Arm Sequence Kit Item Date Map
ByArmSequenceKitItemDateMap.description: Mapping of treatment arm IDs to sequence periods to kit item consumption. Structure: arm → sequenceId → item → KitItemDemandEntry. The sequence ID matches keys in dosingRegimenSequence. Displayed as 'Dosing' in the UI.

.*.description: Mapping of sequence period IDs to kit item demand for this arm.
Mapping of item IDs to KitItemDemandEntry for this sequence period.

ByKitDateMap.title: By Kit Date Map
ByKitDateMap.description: Mapping of kit IDs to date-value maps for site-level kit demand (not per-arm).

ClinicalDemandActuals.title: Clinical Demand Actuals
ClinicalDemandActuals.description: Actual enrollment data entered by users to reconcile with forecast.

enrollment.title: Enrollment Actuals
enrollment.description: Actual enrollment by region and month.

total.title: Total Enrolled
total.description: Total subjects enrolled for this region and month.

sites.title: Sites Actuals
sites.description: Actual site counts by region and month.

notes.title: Actuals Notes
notes.description: Explanatory notes for enrollment actuals by region and month.

siteNotes.title: Site Actuals Notes
siteNotes.description: Explanatory notes for site activation actuals by region and month.
